# `tokens/` — Mixed origin (human-frozen + one CI-derived MD)

This directory does NOT use the `src/`+`dist/` split that other mixed-origin domains do. Reason: the upstream generator (`/sync-design-system`) was decommissioned in plugin v1.79.0 (2026-05-10), so `tokens.json` and `tokens.css` are now manually edited frozen snapshots. A successor generator may re-introduce a `dist/` boundary later; until then the asymmetry below is documented in-place.

## Contents

| File | Origin | Editable? |
|---|---|---|
| `tokens.json` | ✋ Human-frozen (snapshot from `/sync-design-system` 2026-04-30; `$metadata._frozen: true`, `_frozen_reason` cites the decommission) | YES, until successor generator returns |
| `tokens.css` | ✋ Human-frozen (matching disclosure in header comment) | YES, same |
| `token-reference.md` | 🤖 CI-generated by `scripts/render-token-reference.js` from `tokens.json` (carries an `AUTO-GENERATED` HTML comment banner) | NO — auto-derived, edits reverted |

## To change a token

Edit `tokens.json` directly (and add the matching CSS variable in `tokens.css`). On commit, CI regenerates `token-reference.md` automatically. Note: this is interim — when the successor token generator lands (replacing what `/sync-design-system` did), this directory will adopt the standard `src/`+`dist/` split.

## Phase B note

Phase B of the knowledge-repo restructure (see `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-10-knowledge-repo-restructure-design.md` in the plugin repo, gitignored) explicitly chose to keep `tokens/` flat for now (Q2 in the spec's decision log). Re-raise this when the successor generator is in scope.
